task.title: Add assumption gate validation
task.goal: Ensure implementation starts only after high-risk assumptions are verified.
task.scope: Create reusable Assumption Killer artifacts and validator script.

assumptions.statement: The package can use Node.js built-in modules only.
assumptions.verification_method: Check the request quality bar and script requirements.
evidence: User requirement says: Use only Node.js built-in modules. Do not add dependencies.
assumptions.impact_if_wrong: Adding dependencies would make the package harder to reuse and violate the requested constraints.
assumptions.decision: Implement the validator with fs, path, url, and JSON parsing only.

final_verification.notes: The gate contains verified evidence and no high or critical unknown assumptions.
